nodes.name: coding-style.md
nodes.summary: Dart/Flutter coding-style rules covering formatting, immutability, naming, null safety, Dart 3 sealed types and pattern matching, error handling, async/futures, imports, and code generation. Extends the common coding-style rules with language-specific guidance.
nodes.languageNotes: Targets **/*.dart, pubspec.yaml, and analysis_options.yaml; emphasizes Dart 3+ sealed classes and exhaustive switch patterns.

nodes.name: hooks.md
nodes.summary: Dart/Flutter automation hooks defining PostToolUse formatting/analysis hooks, a recommended hook configuration, pre-commit checks, and useful one-liners. Extends the common hooks rules with Dart-specific tooling.

nodes.name: patterns.md
nodes.summary: Dart/Flutter architectural patterns covering the repository pattern, BLoC/Cubit and Riverpod state management, dependency injection, ViewModel and UseCase patterns, freezed immutable state, clean-architecture layer boundaries, and GoRouter navigation. Extends the common patterns rules.
nodes.languageNotes: Covers competing state-management approaches (BLoC/Cubit vs Riverpod) and enforces clean-architecture layer boundaries with freezed and GoRouter.

nodes.name: security.md
nodes.summary: Dart/Flutter security rules covering secrets management, network security, input validation, data protection, Android- and iOS-specific hardening, WebView security, and build-time obfuscation. Extends the common security rules with mobile-specific guidance.
nodes.languageNotes: Adds mobile-specific path targets (AndroidManifest.xml, Info.plist) and platform-specific hardening for Android and iOS.

nodes.name: testing.md
nodes.summary: Dart/Flutter testing rules covering the test framework and test types, unit testing of BLoC (bloc_test) and Riverpod (ProviderContainer) state managers, widget tests, fakes-over-mocks, async testing, golden tests, naming, organization, and coverage. Extends the common testing rules.
nodes.languageNotes: Prescribes fakes over mocks and pairs state-manager tests to their frameworks (bloc_test for BLoC, ProviderContainer for Riverpod).
